name: Greedy Tease
descrip: Get an opponent hot and bothered with just your words. Can charm opponents. Is a Foreplay skill.
outcome: [AttackerName] leans back with a purr of arousal from her treasure chest seat, lazily settling into a lewd pose as she tosses her long curly hair, sighing sweetly while swaying her ample bust side to side, drawing your gaze along her curves before finishing her show by blowing you a tempting kiss.
miss: [AttackerName] teases [TargetName] with sexual promises, but they appear to be unaffected.
statusOutcome: [TargetName] is left charmed by the mimic's seductive wiles, making the dangers of her embrace feel hazy and distant, her come-hither gestures making [TargetHisOrHer] heart flutter...
